title: jasminonerium xylopicron
intro: Jasminonerium xylopicron does not exist, however, I can tell you about a plant that is very similar, Jasminum sambac, which is also known as the Arabian jasmine or as Jasminonerium xylopicron. This plant is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, native to tropical Asia. The medicinal properties of Jasminum sambac include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, and it can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils through preparations such as decoctions and infusions.
